ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "hero_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "aliases" TEXT /* Alternative names and aliases of the character */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Character's alignment (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "combat" INTEGER /* Combat skill level of the character */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability score of the character */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the character */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the character */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence score of the character */,
  "nicknames" TEXT /* Nicknames of the character */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the character */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power level of the character */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the comic book */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the character (e.g., alien, human) */,
  "skin_color" TEXT /* Skin color of the character */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed score of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength score of the character */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the character */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the character's origin */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the character's origin */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the character's abilities */,
  "accuracy_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy measurement */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was first introduced */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the creator (e.g., writer, artist) */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* Name of the comic book issue where the character first appeared */,
  "last_appearance" TEXT /* Name of the comic book issue where the character last appeared */,
  "affiliations" TEXT /* List of affiliations (e.g., teams, organizations) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the character's image */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Numeric score representing the character's popularity */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Numeric score representing the character's engagement level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the publisher's headquarters */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "powers" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power */,
  "power_name" TEXT /* Name of the power */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Description of the origin of the power */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* How rare the power is (e.g., common, rare, unique) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the power */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location (if applicable) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "average_lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the race */,
  "known_abilities" TEXT /* List of known abilities common to the race */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_powers" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "power_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power that the character possesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "power_id")
)
column_names: Alternative names and aliases of the character
Combat skill level of the character

Category of the character (e.g., alien, human)
